mapper.select: select * from member_info where mi_id = #{mi_id} and mi_pw = #{mi_pw}
mapper.insert: insert into member_info(mi_no, mi_id, mi_pw, mi_mobile, mi_email, mi_gender) values (nextval('seq_mi_no'), #{mi_id}, #{mi_pw}, #{mi_mobile}, #{mi_email}, #{mi_gender})
mapper.update: update member_info set mi_pw = #{mi_pw}, mi_mobile = #{mi_mobile}, mi_email = #{mi_email} where mi_no = #{mi_no}
mapper.select: select count(*) from member_info where mi_id = #{mi_id}
